top_signals.title: Europe’s Alternative to Patriot Missile Is Finding More Buyers
top_signals.summary: More nations are evaluating the European-made SAMP/T NG missile defense system, demonstrating the Franco-Italian interceptor’s emergence as an alternative to hard-to-get Patriot batteries from the US.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO raises total of $85.7 billion as underwriters exercise 'greenshoe' overallotment option
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
